name: Main Booking Workflow - Shopify to Provider

nodes.name: Shopify Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Receives new booking orders from Shopify

parameters.functionCode:
// Parse Shopify order data
const order = items[0].json;

const bookingData = {
  bookingId: `BK${Date.now()}`,
  orderId: order.id,
  orderNumber: order.order_number,
  customerName: `${order.customer.first_name} ${order.customer.last_name}`,
  customerEmail: order.customer.email,
  customerPhone: order.customer.phone || order.shipping_address?.phone,
  tourName: order.line_items[0].name,
  tourId: order.line_items[0].product_id,
  tourDate: order.note_attributes?.find(attr => attr.name === 'tour_date')?.value,
  numberOfPeople: parseInt(order.line_items[0].quantity) || 1,
  totalAmount: parseFloat(order.total_price),
  currency: order.currency,
  paymentMethod: order.payment_gateway_names[0] || 'Pending',
  paymentStatus: order.financial_status,
  isPaid: order.financial_status === 'paid',
  specialRequests: order.note,
  createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
  status: 'pending_confirmation',
  // Extract custom fields if needed
  pickupLocation: order.note_attributes?.find(attr => attr.name === 'pickup_location')?.value || 'To be confirmed',
};

return [{ json: bookingData }];

nodes.name: Parse Booking Data
nodes.notes: Extracts and formats booking information from Shopify order

nodes.name: Load Provider Priority List
nodes.notes: Loads provider list sorted by priority

nodes.name: Set Providers Config
nodes.notes: Loads provider configuration from environment variables

nodes.name: Send LINE Message to Provider
nodes.notes: Sends booking request via LINE to current priority provider

nodes.name: Send Acknowledgment Email to Customer
nodes.notes: Sends immediate acknowledgment to customer

nodes.name: Load Acknowledgment Template
nodes.notes: Loads and populates acknowledgment email template

nodes.name: Log to Google Sheets
nodes.notes: Logs booking data to Google Sheets for tracking and analysis

nodes.name: LINE Provider Response Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives responses from providers via LINE

nodes.name: Parse Provider Response
nodes.notes: Parses provider's LINE response (CONFIRM or CANCEL)

nodes.name: Check Response Type
nodes.notes: Routes based on provider response: confirmed or rejected

nodes.name: Load Confirmation Template
nodes.notes: Loads confirmation email template

nodes.name: Send Confirmation Email
nodes.notes: Sends confirmation email to customer with all details

nodes.name: Update Booking Status - Confirmed
nodes.notes: Updates booking status to confirmed in Google Sheets

nodes.name: Create/Update Zoho CRM Contact
nodes.notes: Creates or updates customer in Zoho CRM

nodes.name: Check Next Provider
nodes.notes: Checks if there's another provider to try

nodes.name: More Providers Available?
nodes.notes: Decides whether to try next provider or send rejection

nodes.name: Load Rejection Template
nodes.notes: Loads rejection email with alternatives

nodes.name: Send Rejection Email with Alternatives
nodes.notes: Sends rejection email with alternative dates/tours

nodes.name: Update Booking Status - Rejected
nodes.notes: Updates booking status to rejected in Google Sheets
